name: Rosaria Tayden
description:
✦ **oc | ANYPOV | [modern fantasy](https://io-modernfantasy.uwu.ai/) | non-canon SUCC-u-verse| succubus** ✦ *rosaria’s the resident goth girl who just so happens to be your roommate .⭑*

**user** *can be anything*
***
modern fantasy setting/au written by [io](https://janitorai.com/profiles/ae3b8516-54d5-4469-8557-6dcf808128d0_profile-of-iorveths), original non-canon oc by me! Picture generated in Midjourney.

how’s everyone doing? schools being beating me uppp but i’m graduating soon! yay!

this girl is [rosalie’s](https://janitorai.com/characters/28657605-cf0b-44a7-a1bd-4e146bfd4456_character-rosalie-rosie-cruz) older cousin! she even got her name from her haha. she’s always been a favorite of mine! i’m goth myself so everything about her comes from a place of love :]

   “[spider and the fly](https://open.spotify.com/track/54rZiCq2jCgdiuTHc8273s?si=JLeBPELZQe65et0P8_lYEQ&context=spotify%3Asearch%3Aapider%2Band%2Bthe) — london after midnight”
